failure.message: AssertionError: Should have bl_coins field assert 'bl_coins' in {'can_mint': False, 'daily_limit': 3, 'mints_today': 3, 'reason': 'Daily limit reached (3 mints). Resets at midnight UTC.'}

Resets at midnight UTC.'}
